text:
LABEL: Scope of Medicaid or CHIP Benefits — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A flag that indicates the scope of Medicaid or Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP) benefits to 
which a beneficiary is entitled, in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months 
during the year. 

SHORT NAME: RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_01 
RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_02 
RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_03 
RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_04 
RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_05 
RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_06 
 RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_07 
RSTRCTD_BNFTS_CD_08
